indicators.name: long wooden conference table
indicators.rationale: The long table is not suitable for individual work as it is designed for group meetings.

indicators.name: several chairs around the table
indicators.rationale: Multiple chairs around the table suggest a meeting or collaborative environment rather than a solo workspace.

indicators.name: lack of personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no dedicated desk or table for individual work, making it difficult to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: The chairs around the table do not appear to be ergonomic, which is important for extended computer work.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The long table is not suitable for individual work as it is not designed for individual use.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting for computer work
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting specifically designed for computer work, which can cause eye strain and reduce productivity.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo) due to the lack of a dedicated workspace, ergonomic seating, and proper lighting. The long wooden conference table and multiple chairs suggest a collaborative environment rather than a solo workspace, making it difficult to set up a computer workstation.
